sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86666" key="proapocure/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-ξῠρέω</orth>, <sense id="n86666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shave before,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:53:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.53.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
